articles.title: Google Cloud surpasses $20B but says growth was capacity-constrained
articles.summary: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.

articles.title: Jack Mallers' Twenty One Capital surges after majority holder Tether proposes 3-way merger
Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
articles.summary: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.

articles.title: Big Tech's multi-billion dollar AI bets are still on track as Mag 7 giants report earnings
Fusion power startup Zap Energy pulls a partial pivot, adding nuclear fission to the mix
articles.summary: Surprise! Fusion startup Zap Energy says it will be developing fission reactors alongside its fusion devices.

articles.title: Eric Trump says bitcoin in its 'greatest period ever' as Wall Street falls in line
Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
articles.summary: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

articles.title: Fed chair Jerome Powell says he will stay on as Govenor after term amid legal pressure
Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
articles.summary: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

articles.title: Tech giant Meta starts paying some creators in stablecoin with Stripe's support
More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
articles.summary: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.
